title: thermopsis macrophylla var. velutina
intro: Thermopsis macrophylla var. velutina, also known as the velvety bigleaf goldenraze or bigleaf goldenpea, is a plant species within the legume family, characterized by its velvety leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Thermopsis macrophylla var. velutina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
